description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image. Define a single stage called build. Add a job named build that runs in the build stage, executes "cd 'Project Avenue'" then compiles all .cpp and .hpp files with "g++ *.cpp *.hpp -std=c++11 -lpthread -lsfml-system -lsfml-window -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-audio -o main", and finally uploads the resulting "main" executable as an artifact. No caches, services, or special rules are required.
